emails.subject: THANKS!
emails.body: THANKS! Thanks you so much for taking Kim and I to the game yesterday! We both had the BEST time! It seems like it has been forever since we have hung out I miss that! I'll bring you stew later today so you will definitely get nourishment tonight. Take care! MSA

emails.subject: RE: THANKS!
emails.body: RE: THANKS! your welcome. It was really good to see you again. Maybe we can so something again before 2 months To: Arnold, John

emails.subject: RE: THANKS!
emails.body: Oh, I was actually thinking four months. Smart ass. To: Allen, Margaret
